name: TRANSCONTINENTAL REALTY INVESTORS INC
summary: Transcontinental Realty Investors Inc (TCI) is a real estate investment company. Based on the 10-K filing structure, the company is engaged in real estate investment and management activities, including ownership and operation of real estate properties. The filing references properties, legal proceedings, and financial operations consistent with a real estate investment trust or similar real estate holding company.
